Everything is built and verified. Here's the final report.

---

# HR Analytics Dashboard (Peoplelytics) — Reproduction Report

Reproduced the OSS prototype `39-hr-analytics.html` end-to-end in NocoBase env **appslib** (2.1.0-alpha.45), strictly following the embedded `nb-spec`. All blocks render on dark theme, **0 console/page errors**, native View drawer works.

## Collections (prefix `hra_`)
| Collection | Rows | Key fields | Relations |
|---|---|---|---|
| `hra_departments` | 8 | name, code, cost_center, headcount_target | ← employees, ← snapshots |
| `hra_employees` | 83 | full_name, employee_no, gender, job_level, employment_type, status, performance_band, hire_date, exit_date, tenure_months, **tenure_bucket** (added per spec), age, annual_salary, is_regrettable_exit | `department` m2o, `manager` m2o (self) |
| `hra_headcount_snapshots` | 60 (12 company-wide + 48 per-dept) | period, period_date, headcount, hires, exits, attrition_rate, avg_tenure_months | `department` m2o |

**Seed coverage** — every enum ≥1 row: status {active 49, on_leave 8, notice 12, exited 14}, gender {male 44, female 36, other 3}, employment_type {full_time 55, part_time 12, contractor 10, intern 6}, job_level all ic1–ic4/m1–m3, performance_band {meets 40, exceeds 19, below 24}, both regrettable values. The 8 named prototype exits seeded verbatim; company-wide snapshots use the prototype's exact 12-month numbers.

## Pages
- **List pages** (Table + Filter + View/Edit drawer): Departments `x6eeymx78vu` · Employees `7ardycosn1p` · Headcount Snapshots `zyyzev37cgn`
- **招牌 page — Workforce Analytics dashboard: pageSchemaUid `ksbxehqpl38`** (pageUid `xq7x5ze2qhl`) → `/admin/ksbxehqpl38`

Dashboard regions (native container + JS content per the skill's hard rule):
| Region | Block | JS kernel |
|---|---|---|
| Global slicer | native FilterForm (dept/employment/status/level → cross-block filter) | — |
| KPI strip | **JSBlock** (6 cards, accent bars, delta badges, sparklines) | yes |

# HR Analytics Dashboard (Peoplelytics) — Reproduction Report

Reproduced the OSS prototype `39-hr-analytics.html` end-to-end in NocoBase env **appslib** (2.1.0-alpha.45), strictly following the embedded `nb-spec`. All blocks render on dark theme, **0 console/page errors**, native View drawer works.

## Collections (prefix `hra_`)
| Collection | Rows | Key fields | Relations |
|---|---|---|---|
| `hra_departments` | 8 | name, code, cost_center, headcount_target | ← employees, ← snapshots |
| `hra_employees` | 83 | full_name, employee_no, gender, job_level, employment_type, status, performance_band, hire_date, exit_date, tenure_months, **tenure_bucket** (added per spec), age, annual_salary, is_regrettable_exit | `department` m2o, `manager` m2o (self) |
| `hra_headcount_snapshots` | 60 (12 company-wide + 48 per-dept) | period, period_date, headcount, hires, exits, attrition_rate, avg_tenure_months | `department` m2o |

**Seed coverage** — every enum ≥1 row: status {active 49, on_leave 8, notice 12, exited 14}, gender {male 44, female 36, other 3}, employment_type {full_time 55, part_time 12, contractor 10, intern 6}, job_level all ic1–ic4/m1–m3, performance_band {meets 40, exceeds 19, below 24}, both regrettable values. The 8 named prototype exits seeded verbatim; company-wide snapshots use the prototype's exact 12-month numbers.

## Pages
- **List pages** (Table + Filter + View/Edit drawer): Departments `x6eeymx78vu` · Employees `7ardycosn1p` · Headcount Snapshots `zyyzev37cgn`
- **招牌 page — Workforce Analytics dashboard: pageSchemaUid `ksbxehqpl38`** (pageUid `xq7x5ze2qhl`) → `/admin/ksbxehqpl38`

Dashboard regions (native container + JS content per the skill's hard rule):
| Region | Block | JS kernel |
|---|---|---|
| Global slicer | native FilterForm (dept/employment/status/level → cross-block filter) | — |
| KPI strip | **JSBlock** (6 cards, accent bars, delta badges, sparklines) | yes |
| Headcount trend | native Chart (area, period-sorted) | — |
| Hires vs exits & attrition | native Chart **custom dual-axis** (green/red bars + orange attrition line) | raw ECharts |
| Headcount by department | native Chart (horizontal bar) | — |
| Gender split | native Chart (doughnut) | — |
| Tenure distribution | native Chart **custom** (ordered buckets + pretty labels) | raw ECharts |
| Attrition by department | native Table + **JS mini-bar column**, scoped to latest period, sorted attrition desc (8 rows) | yes |
| Recent departures | native List + **JS card** (avatar, REGRETTABLE badge, dept·level·tenure, exit date) | yes |

## Self-Score: **8.5/10**

## Comparison vs prototype
- **Strong match**: layout grid (filter → KPI → 2-col → 3-col → bottom), all block types per spec, the signature dual-axis chart (hires/exits bars + attrition line on right axis), KPI strip with sparklines, attrition mini-bar leaderboard sorted Sales 18.1%→People 5.6%, departure cards with avatars/regrettable badges. Headcount 724, attrition 11.8%, net +13 all match.
- **Expected differences (live-computed, not fudged per skill guidance)**: Open-vs-target shows **-34** (724/758, target summed from seeded depts) vs prototype's -8; Regrettable **50%** vs 54%.
- **Gaps**: filter bar uses Job Level instead of the prototype's 6M/12M/YTD period toggle + Export button; headcount trend has no dashed target band; the trend-sparkline column on the attrition table was dropped (the mini-bar % text also clips slightly at the card edge); charts show raw enum values (`female`/`male`) rather than title-case. System is dark-themed (required) vs the light prototype.

## Gotchas hit
1. **Enum colors must be the named palette** (red/blue/green/…), not hex — collection create 500'd until fixed. (First employees create silently failed for this reason.)
2. **m2o reverseField needs explicit `target`+`foreignKey`** on both sides, else "requires target".
3. **filterForm fields require an explicit `target`** block key when m
